title: Closed Rubyless App Runtime Migration
summary: Moved app-facing docs, search, catalogue search, and catalogue prose generation to Python while keeping browser app surfaces JavaScript-owned and Ruby/Jekyll limited to explicit public-site preview/build.
effect: Studio, Analytics, Docs Viewer management, and UI Catalogue no longer depend on Ruby or Bundler for app runtime behavior or app-facing generated data; public-site Ruby/Jekyll verification remains a separate manual layer.
verification: Task 31 app smoke profiles passed for Studio Analytics UI Catalogue and Docs Viewer.
Task 32 public-site build passed and preview served public routes before shutdown.
